title: 3M Company 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for business segments, product examples, revenue, profitability, distribution, market value, and risk context.

title: 3M Investor Relations 2025 Financial Results
note: Investor relations summary for 2025 sales, adjusted sales, EPS, and operating margin figures.

title: 3M Consumer Products and Brands
note: Official consumer-products page identifying Post-it branded products, labels, hooks, tapes, homecare, office, and school-supply categories.

title: 3M Brands
note: Official brand listing for Post-it, Scotch, and other 3M consumer and industrial brands.

title: 3M Company Market Cap
note: Market-data source used for the May 2026 market capitalization approximation.

title: RepRap Project
note: Open-source 3D-printing project used as evidence for local fabrication and open hardware tooling enablers.

title: Precious Plastic Basic Machines
note: Open-source recycling-machine documentation used as evidence for local recycled-material loops and small-scale production of simple objects.
